creator: cmf@netins.net
text:
The p5-Apache port uses version 1.00b2 of the
mod_perl package, which has not been around
for some time.  (The current version of
mod_perl is 1.07.)

Fix: 

I have placed an updated version of the
p5-Apache port in this location:

ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/p5-Apache.tar.gz
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/p5-Apache; make
